headline: Data centers and gas demand make boring pipelines great again
summary: Williams is the "poster child" for gas pipeline and power growth amid the new construction boom.

headline: Here's What to Expect From The Williams Companies’ Next Earnings Report
summary: The Williams Companies is all ready to release its FY2026 Q1 earnings shortly, and analysts are expecting its earnings to rise in the single digits.
